positive: A symmetrical, intricate mandala design featuring celestial flora and fauna. The main subject is a mythical bioluminescent forest scene merging with deep space nebula elements. Include stylized cosmic moths, glowing stylized constellations forming geometric patterns, and elegant, twisting roots of hyper-dimensional trees. Style: Neo-Psychedelic Art Nouveau vector illustration, characterized by clean lines, strong silhouettes, and highly decorative composition. Color direction: Deep sapphire blues, vibrant amethyst purples, electric cyan accents, highlighted by glowing ethereal gold and neon turquoise. Composition should be perfectly balanced and centralized, designed to fill an apparel print seamlessly. Lighting: Dramatic, glowing internal luminescence emanating from the flora and fauna, creating deep shadows and brilliant highlights. High detail, vector aesthetic, ready for screen printing.
